# action

**Instance Property**

The action the Message Filter app extension recommends that the system perform on the queried message.

## Declaration

```swift
var action: ILMessageFilterAction { get set }
```

## Specifying the Action

- **subAction**: The subaction the Message Filter app extension recommends that the system perform on the queried message.
